name: No-Bake Chocolate Cheesecake (Phillips)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, microwave the chocolate chips for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes at HIGH (100%), stirring occasionally until melted and smooth.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese with sugar on low speed until creamy.
4. Gradually add butter on low speed and blend in melted chocolate until incorporated.
5. Gently fold in whipped topping until fully combined.
6. Spoon the mixture into prepared crust.
7. Cover tightly and refrigerate until firm.
